name: 5ct Jewelry Cord - Mondo Llama™
description:
It's fun and easy to make cool jewelry creations at home with 5ct Jewelry Cord from Mondo Llama™. This 5-pack set of stretchy jewelry cord includes 10 yards each of beautiful pink, yellow, green, blue and purple cord for beading, braiding and other jewelry crafting needs. With a stretchy design that makes your bracelets more easy to slip on and off, it's a must-have item in your stash of crafting supplies for making everything from beaded friendship bracelets to cute woven keychains.

Make it bright. Make it bold. Make it up. And most of all, make it you. Find your creativity in the making with Mondo Llama.
